characterPresencePlanEn: the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action
mustShowZh: 一只手正从一本旧书里抽出一张字迹晕开的便签
人物上半身或至少肩颈以上的姿态，表现出动作暂停的瞬间
书架或桌面作为背景，显示整理书架的日常环境
mustShowEn: a hand pulling a faded, ink-blurred note from an old book
the protagonist's upper body or at least shoulder-up posture, showing the moment of paused action
bookshelf or desk as background, showing the ordinary context of tidying up
mayShowZh: 人物头发上的红色小发夹
mayShowEn: a few other books scattered nearby
the small red hairclip in the character's hair
mustAvoidZh: 时尚杂志般的摆拍姿势
将整理书架的动作改写为与他人互动
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the tidying action into an interaction with another person
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 月见璃音在整理书架时，发现一张旧便签的瞬间。
